_

12046.name: Grape Juice Herbal Tea
12046.description:
A sweetly scented
tea made by mixing
herbs and grape juice.
Int +1
_

12047.name: Autumn Red Tea
12047.description:
A tea made with 3
different herbs that
give it a refreshingly
strong scent, but also
give it a bland flavor. INT +2
_

12048.name: Honey Herbal Tea
12048.description:
An invigoratingly hot
herbal whose flavor
is enhanced with the
sweetness of honey.
Int +3
_

12049.name: Morocc Fruit Wine
12049.description:
A sweet and sour fruit
wine that was invented
by a merchant from
Morroc. Ladies love it. INT +4
_

12050.name: Mastela Fruit Wine
12050.description:
Wine distilled from
Mastela fruit that
helps the drinker to
maintain clarity of
thought. INT +5
_

12051.name: Steamed Crab Nippers
12051.description:
A simple dish made
from steamed crab
nippers and herbs.
Vit +1
_

12052.name: Assorted Seafood
12052.description:
Assorted seafood that
makes people that live
near the sea feel very
homesick. Unless, of
course, they're eating
this food at home. Vit +2

12053.name: Clam Soup
12053.description:
A soup made with
boiled clam meat.
Vit +3
_

12054.name: Seasoned Jellyfish
12054.description:
Steamed tenacles
flavored with herbs
and squid ink dressing
that, weirdly enough, is a delicious health food.
Vit +4
_

12055.name: Spicy Fried Bao
12055.description:
A bao that is fried
and seasoned with
spicy sauce. If you're
not used to spicy food, it's not a good idea to
eat too many. Vit +5
_

12056.name: Frog Egg Squid Ink Soup
12056.description:
A soup made with
squid ink broth and
frog eggs that most
people can't eat until
they close their eyes.
Agi +1
_

12057.name: Smooth Noodle
12057.description:
Incredibly smooth,
slick, and slippery
noodles that are
very difficult to eat.
Agi +2
_

12058.name: Tentacle Cheese Gratin
12058.description:
Cheese gratin with
steamed tentacles
mixed into it for
a unique flavor.
Agi +3
_

12059.name: Lutie Cold Noodle
12059.description:
Spicy, cold noodles
garnished with sliced
pumpkin. Agi +4
_

12060.name: Steamed Bat Wing in Pumpkin
12060.description:
Steamed pumpkin and
Red Bat Wings wrapped
in a Hinale leaflet that have a combined flavor

_

12061.name: Honey Grape Juice
12061.description:
A special mixed drink
of grape juice and honey that has a sweet and
sour taste. DEX +1
_

12062.name: Chocolate Mousse Cake
12062.description:
A special chocolate
mousse cake with a smooth luxurious flavor
that even Charles Orleans would be proud of. DEX +2
_

12063.name: Fruit Mix
12063.description:
A mix of various,
crisp fruit flavored
with light, sweet syrup. DEX +3
_

12064.name: Cream Sandwich
12064.description:
A hearty sandwich
made with slices of
freshly baked bread,
ground meat and cream
cheese that is a favorite dish to eat for lunch.
Dex +4
_

12065.name: Green Salad
12065.description:
A trendy green salad
that is topped with
sweet Umbala dressing.
Dex +5
_

12066.name: Fried Monkey Tails
12066.description:
Lightly spiced
monkey tails deep
fried in oil that are
popular as a side dish
for drinking. LUK +1
_

12067.name: Mixed Juice
12067.description:
A cocktail mixed
from various fruit
juices. LUK +2
_

12068.name: Fried Sweet Potato
12068.description:
Crunchy, fried sweet
potatoes topped with
light syrup. LUK +3
_

12069.name: Steamed Ancient Lips
12069.description:
Steamed fish with
ancient lips wrapped
in a fresh leaf that is supposedly good for
a man's vigor. LUK +4
_

12070.name: Fried Scorpion Tails
12070.description:
A fried tail from a
scorpion, which is
said to be the most
nutritious and tasty
part of a scorpion.
There are trace bits
of poison, so don't
eat too much. LUK +5
_

12071.name: Shiny Marinade Beef
12071.description:
A marinated beef dish
whose spendorous
flavor can only be
described as...shiny.
Str +6
_

12072.name: Whole Roast
12072.description:
A great meal for
meat lovers, this
roast is spiced up
with a special sauce.
Str +7
_

12073.name: Bearfoot Special
12073.description:
One of the finest
dishes from Louyang,
a delicacy made from
a bear's meaty foot.
Str +8
_

12074.name: Tendon Satay
12074.description:
A fresh and juicy
satay made from
thick tendons. Str +9
_

12075.name: Steamed Tongue
12075.description:
The epitome of
Louyang cuisine.
It's ingredients may
be hard to find, but
culinarily speaking,
it's a masterpiece.
Str +10
_

12076.name: Red Mushroom Wine
12076.description:
A fragrant grape
wine mixed with Red
Mushrooms. INT +6
_

12077.name: Special Royal Jelly Herbal Tea
12077.description:
An herbal tea mixed
with royal jelly that
has a pungent scent,
but a refreshing flavor. INT +7
_

12078.name: Royal Family Tea
12078.description:
A sweetly scented tea,
one of Charles Orleans's specialties, that is
regularly enjoyed by
the royal family.
Int +8
_

12079.name: Tristram 12
12079.description:
One of the most
exquisite drinks
ever created that
was presented in
celebration of the
coronation of King
Tristram III. INT +9
_

12080.name: Dragon Breath Cocktail
12080.description:
A cocktail with an
unforgettable flavor
as impressive as a dragon's breath. INT +10
_

12081.name: Awfully Bitter Bracer
12081.description:
A strange medicine
said to have as much
healing power as its
bitterness. Vit +6
_

12082.name: Sumptuous Feast
12082.description:
A magnificent feast
fit for gods that would make mortals cry
tears of joy. Vit +7
_

12083.name: Giant Burito
12083.description:
A jumbo sized
burrito for jumbo
sized appetites.
Vit +8
_

12084.name: Ascending Dragon Soup
12084.description:
A spicy soup with
dragon meat whose

sensation of flight.
Vit +9
_

12085.name: Immortal Stew
12085.description:
A stew with a funky
smell that looks quite

immortality. Vit +10
_

12086.name: Chile Shrimp Gratin
12086.description:
Shrimp and chile
gratin that is so
spicy, it burns.
Agi +6
_

12087.name: Steamed Alligator with Vegetable

dish made with
steamed alligator
meat wrapped in
vegetables.
Agi +7
_

12088.name: Incredibly Spicy Curry
12088.description:
A spicy curry with a
spice known to have
the flavor of patience. Fortunately, the taste is
balanced with pumpkin.
Agi +8
_

12089.name: Special Meat Stew
12089.description:
Louyang's specialty
stew laced with all
sorts of meat that
has a tempting scent
Agi +9
_

12090.name: Steamed Desert Scorpions
12090.description:
One of the four best
dishes in the Sograt
Desert, this scorpion
dish is cooked using
the heat of the desert
sands. Agi +10
_

12091.name: Peach Cake
12091.description:
A sweet and lightly
scrumptious cake made
with peaches grown
in Kunlun. DEX +6
_

12092.name: Soul Haunted Bread

A deliciously sweet
bread, haunted by
flavor. DEX +7
_

12093.name: Special Toast
12093.description:
Large toasted bread
garnished with huge
amounts of meat, cheese, and vegetables. It's so
big, no one has ever
finished it. DEX +8
_

12094.name: Heavenly Fruit Juice
12094.description:
Heavenly tasting
juice that makes
the drinker feel
refreshed and relaxed.
Dex +9
_

12095.name: Hwergelmir's Tonic
12095.description:
Named after the
legendary spring
believed to be the
source of the world's
rivers, this beverage
is famous for its
amazing taste. DEX +10
_

12096.name: Lucky Soup
12096.description:
A soup that is
rumored to bring
good luck when it
is eaten hot. LUK +6
_

12097.name: Assorted Shish Kebob
12097.description:
Marinated meat and
vegetables roasted
on a skewer. LUK +7
_

12098.name: Strawberry Flavored Rice Ball
12098.description:
A riceball garnished
with strawberries that
give it an unexpectedly delicious taste. LUK +8
_

12099.name: Blood Flavored Soda
12099.description:
A strangely sweet
drink that children
seem to like, although
the aftertaste is pretty gross. LUK +9
_

12100.name: Cooked Nine Tail's Tails
12100.description:

luck on those fortunate enough to eat it. LUK +10
_

branch with a contract

regular Dead Branches.
_

12104.name: Random Quiver

An unlabeled
arrow quiver.

chosen element.
_

12105.name: Taming Gift Set
12105.description:
A beautifully
decorated gift set
that contains a taming
item and Pet Armor.

Armor and taming item.
_

12106.name: Jewelry Box
12106.description:
A beautiful Jewelry
Box that contains
an Accessory.
Produces a random
Accessory item.
_

12107.name: Wrapped Mask
12107.description:
A mask that has been
carefully wrapped.
Produces a random
Mask item.
_

12108.name: Scroll Package
12108.description:
A scroll that has
been packaged and
carefully wrapped.
Produces a random
Magic Scroll item.
_

12109.name: Poring Box

A wrapped box stamped with the Poring seal. You
can faintly hear rustling coming from inside of it.
_

12110.description:
A first aid kit that
should contain potions, although they're known
to hold other things... Produces a random
Potion item.
_

12111.name: Bundle of Food
12111.description:
A bundle of food
that contains
various dishes.
Produces a
random food item.
_

A delicious alcoholic
beverage made with
exotic fruits found
only in Morroc. It's
very sweet, so people
can get drunk off it
without realizing it.
_

the drinker the feeling of lounging on the beach.
_

the user's weapon with
the Fire element for 3 minutes.
_

12115.name: Elemental Converter[Water]
12115.description:
Temporarily enchant
the user's weapon with
the Water element for 3 minutes.
_

12116.name: Elemental Converter[Earth]
12116.description:
Temporarily enchant
the user's weapon with
the Earth element for 3 minutes.
_

12117.name: Elemental Converter[Wind]
12117.description:
Temporarily enchant
the user's weapon with
the Wind element for 3 minutes.
_

temporarily increase
the user's resistance

damage from the Water
element for the potion's active duration.

12119.name: Coldproof Potion
12119.description:
A potion that will
temporarily increase
the user's resistance
to the Water element at the cost of increasing
damage from the Wind
element for the potion's active duration.
_

12120.description:
A potion that will
temporarily increase
the user's resistance
to the Earth element at the cost of increasing
damage from the Fire
element for the potion's active duration.
_

12121.name: Thunderproof Potion

A potion that will
temporarily increase
the user's resistance
to the Wind element at the cost of increasing
damage from the Earth
element for the potion's active duration.
_

Embossed with the characters for safety, luck and longevity, these cookies are made to wish good fortune to those who eat them.
Temporarily increases Hit by 30.
_

These traditionalcrackers from a nation in the far East are made of mixed flour, honey and sweet liquor.

_

_

use. It's a little crude, but it's also portable.
_

you to craft meals with that homemade quality.
_

A professional cooking
kit that only great chefs generally use to make

quality. These are
wasted on mere tyros.

A cooking kit said
to be used by chefs

exquisite dishes.

refreshing drink that

memories of the night
before when drank in

effect on its user.

12145.name: Blind Sphere Pack

A bullet cartridge
that contains 500
Blind Spheres.
_

12146.name: Poison Sphere Pack
12146.description:
A bullet cartridge
that contains 500
Poison Spheres.
_

12147.name: Freezing Sphere Pack
12147.description:
A bullet cartridge
that contains 500
Freezing Spheres.
_

12148.name: Flare Sphere Pack

A bullet cartridge
that contains 500
Flare Spheres.
_

A bullet cartridge
that contains 500
regular Bullets.
_

12150.name: Blood Ammo Case
12150.description:
A bullet cartridge
that contains 500
Bloody Bullets.
_

12151.name: Silver Ammo Case
12151.description:
A bullet cartridge
that contains 500
Silver Bullets.
_

Bow Mercenary.

_

Summon a 10th Grade,
which is the top rank,
Sword Mercenary.
This item can only be put into storage.
_

Summon a 10th Grade, which is the top rank, Spear Mercenary.

_

_

A SP Potion provided by the Mercenary Guild that can only be used for Mercenaries.
It cannot restore SP for players.

_

A tasty pumpkin flavored treat, usually enjoyed during the fall season.
_

_

_

_

A Rice Cake that is flavored with a hint of Vanilla.
_

12200.name: X-mas Cake

Christmas limited cake.
When you use it, recover small HP, Start 3 level Magnificat skill.
(This item will be deleted with Christmas event closing.)

12202.description:

_
Usable: Cooked Food

This scorpion dish is cooked with the heat of the desert sand, and is one of the four best dishes in Sograt Desert cuisine.

_

This beverage is named after the legendary spring that is believed to be the source of the world's rivers, and is famous for its pure, amazing taste.
_

12206.name: Cooked Nine Tail's Tails

A rare, specialty Payon dish that bestows luck to those fortunate enough to eat it.
_
Usable: Cooked Food

12207.description:
A funky smelling, suspicious looking stew that really does make you feel like an immortal when you eat it.
_
Usable: Cooked Food
Effect: VIT +10
Duration: 30 minutes

12208.name: Battle Manual
12208.description:
This well written, detailed manual explains effective battle methods.
_
Usable: Supportive

12209.name: Life Insurance

A life insurance certificate issued by Kafra Headquarters.
_

Sweet, tasty bubble gum.
_
Usable: Supportive

Duration: 30 minutes

12211.description:
A Kafra name card issued by the Kafra Headquarters..
_
Usable: Supportive

An enchanted, giant wing from an ancient creatures.
_

Pressing the button on this stick will flash blinding light that seems to cause memory loss.
Resets the Skill Tree and gives the corresponding number of Skill Points.
This item can only be used in town, and the character must carry 0 weight, and cannot be equipped with a Pushcart, Falcon, or PecoPeco.
Cannot be used by Novice Class.
_

12214.description:
A clean convex mirror that can be used to detect the appearance of Boss monsters.
10 minute duration that is canceled when the player leaves the map or logs out.
Lord of the Dead, and Boss monster in the Bio Lab, Ktullanux, Memory of Thanatos, and some other event MVP monsters cannot be detected by using this item.
_

12215.name: LV10 Blessing Scroll
12215.description:
A scroll in which a single use of Level 10 Blessing has been recorded.
Caution-- This item won't work while your character is casting a spell or skill.
_

12216.name: LV10 Agil Scroll
12216.description:
A scroll in which a single use of Level 10 Increase AGI has been recorded.
Caution-- This item won't work while your character is casting a spell or skill.
This item consumes 15 HP and will be ineffective if the character has fewer than 15 HP.
_

12217.name: LV5 Aspersio Scroll
12217.description:
A scroll in which a single use of Level 5 Aspersio has been recorded.
If there is no Holy Water, scroll will be damaged when used.
Caution-- This item won't work while your character is casting a spell or skill.
_

12218.name: LV5 Assumptio Scroll
12218.description:
A scroll in which a single use of Level 5 Assumptio has been recorded.
Caution-- This item won't work while your character is casting a spell or skill.
_

12219.name: LV10 Wind Walker Scroll
12219.description:
A scroll in which a single use of Level 10 Wind Walker has been recorded.
Caution-- This item won't work while your character is casting a spell or skill.
_

A scroll in which a single use of Level 5 Adrenaline Rush has been recorded.
If the user is not equipped with an Axe or Mace, the scroll will be consumed with no effect.
_

12221.name: Megaphone
12221.description:
A suspicious looking piece of machinery that allows server wide broadcasting.
_
Usable: Supportive

12225.name: Sweet Candy Cane

A candy cane that is so sweet, it can melt the human tongue.
Usable: Taming item
Monster: Santa Goblin

12234.name: Fierce Cacao 99%

A chocolate bar whose content is 99% Cacao:
It tastes more bitter than sweet, but chocolate aficionados love it for its rugged flavor and various health benefits.
_
Usable: Restorative
Heal: 25% HP

12235.name: Chocolate Strawberry
12235.description:
A ripe, sweet strawbery covered in a smooth layer of luscious chocolate.
_

12236.name: Chocolate Tart
12236.description:
A crunchy tart filled with rich chocolate and topped with fresh cream.
_

12237.name: Junky Chocolate
12237.description:
This chocolate has obviously been cooked too long, and its burnt stench can be smelled from a distance.
_

12241.name: Mercenary Concentration Potion
12241.description:
A Concentration Potion for Mercenaries that slightly increases ASPD.
_

12242.name: Mercenary Awakening Potion
12242.description:
An Awakening Potion for Mercenaries that increases ASPD.
_

12243.name: Mercenary Berserk Potion
12243.description:
A Berserk Potion for Mercenaries that greatly increases ASPD.
_

12245.name: Green Ale
12245.description:
A frothy green ale brewed by O'Riley the Leprechaun.
_

12246.name: Mystical Card Album
12246.description:
Powerful spirits are sealed within this album.
What will happen if the seal is undone?
_

12258.name: Bombring Capsule

A box with a bomb capsule. When you use a bomb poring is summoned. Flammable!.
_

12260.name: Cool Summer Outfit
12260.description:
This refreshing outfit truly is the sidearm of an experienced adventurer.
Allowing one to remain cool in the face of adversity.
_
Warning: Do not wear outfit when in battle; it is only to be used in relaxed situations.
_
Cannot be Dropped or Traded.
_

12263.name: Field Manual
12263.description:
A manual that explains the most efficient way to battle. It is a very detailed and well composed manual.
_

12269.name: Tasty Pink Ration
12269.description:
Foodstuffs prepared for urgent situations. Don't eat too fast, you might choke on it.
ATK +15 for 10 minutes.
_

12270.name: Tasty White Ration
12270.description:
Foodstuffs prepared for urgent situations. Don't eat too fast, you might choke on it.
MATK +15 for 10 minutes.
_

12271.name: Military Ration A
12271.description:
Meal Ready to Eat. Improved Ration A, which is convenient for a busy life. Don't be so sure about the taste.
Restores amount of HP by 5%
_

12272.name: Military Ration B
12272.description:
Meal Ready to Eat. Improved Ration B, which is convenient for a busy life. Don't be so sure about the taste.
Hit +33 for 10 minutes.
_

12273.name: Military Ration C
12273.description:
Meal Ready to Eat. Improved Ration C, which is convenient for a busy life. Don't be so sure about the taste.
Flee +33 for 10 minutes.
_

A mercenary contract with Alice to assist you in your battles.
Can be stored.

12292.name: Unripe Yggdrasilberry

Unripe Fruit from the Yggdrasil tree which brings life to our world.
Restores 20% HP.

16186.name: Baby Dragon Hat Box
16186.description:
A box containing 1 Baby Dragon Hat.
This can be purchased Playspan store at store.playspan.com
Can be traded and stored.
Once opened, the hat can only be placed in storage.
Description:
A baby dragon who has been trained to help its master.
From May 6 to June 3
It has the ability to grant its wearer 20% more Base experience for each dragon type monster killed.
Increases damage and resistance to Dragon type monsters by 10%.
This item is account bound.
Slot : 1
Defense: 3
Position: Upper
Level Requirement: 1
Jobs: All

Locations: ''Prontera'', ''Geffen'', ''Payon'', ''Morroc'', ''Al De Baran'' or ''Alberta'' when waved in the air.
Warning: If no town is selected, the item will disappear.
Green Butterfly Wing:
An enchanted butterfly's wing that instantly sends its user to the towns of the Schwaltzwalt Republic.
Locations: ''Juno'', ''Lighthalzen'', Einbroch'' or ''Hugel'' when waved in the air.
Warning: If no town is selected, the item will disappear.
Red Butterfly Wing:
An enchanted butterfly's wing that instantly sends its user to the towns of Arunafeltz.
Locations: ''Veins'' or ''Rachel''
Warning: If no town is selected, the item will disappear.
Blue Butterfly Wing:
An enchanted butterfly's wing that instantly sends its user to the island towns of Rune Midgard.
Locations: ''Ayothaya'', ''Amatsu'', ''Luoyang'', ''Kunlun''
Warning: If no town is selected, the item will disappear.
